text: Hi, Dr. Vidali here. This is a simple example of a myomectomy, but for a submucous fibroid with a large submucous component. Only new thing is the use of a Williams needle to inject the diluted vasopressin, which is a new technique, which I think is useful. Also, towards the end of the video, you will see how the the fibroid was really in a occupying a large space of the submucous area and you can see the endometrium bulging out and not entered obviously the closure is a standard closure in layer in layers so i think an example of a relatively simple but i would argue safely executed myomectomy

And lastly, if you need to reach out to me, you can, of course, look me up online. You can find me also on Instagram as endometriosis surgeon. Feel free to reach out if you have questions. If you're a patient, reach out to me for a consultation at the website. The easiest website is preventmiscarriage.com. It's not just about fertility. It's about surgery in general. But there is a link there to find me very easily. Thank you.
